hooks.command: if ! git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; upstream=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref @{u} 2>/dev/null) || upstream=""; unsynced=""; if [ -n "$upstream" ]; then unsynced=$(git log @{u}..HEAD --oneline -- CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null); fi; uncommitted=$(git status --porcelain CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$unsynced" ] || [ -n "$uncommitted" ]; then printf '%s' '{"decision":"block","reason":"CLAUDE.md was modified but the sync-project-files skill has not run. Read .claude/skills/sync-project-files.md and execute it to update SPEC.md and FixMyFashion_Tracker.xlsx, then stop."}'; fi; exit 0
